page_content:
ASTR399 Honors Seminar (1-16 Credits)

Credit according to work done.

Restriction: Must be admitted to the departmental honors program in astronomy.

ASTR406 Stellar Structure and Evolution (3 Credits)

Study of stellar internal structure, nuclear reactions, and energy transport. Study of stellar evolution of both low-mass and high-mass stars, including the stellar end states of white dwarfs, neutron stars, and black holes.

Prerequisite: ASTR320; or permission of CMNS-Astronomy department. Credit Only Granted for. ASTR498N or ASTR406.
